name: naikaku-ai-togo-system
description: Japan-born multi-model AI cabinet workbench for governed planning, coding runners, sandboxed execution, critique, supervision, and evidence-based iteration.

scripts.rehearsal:drill: tsx scripts/release-drill-fixtures.ts --out output/release-drill && tsx scripts/rehearsal.ts --strict --workspace output/release-drill/workspace.json --run output/release-drill/run.json --provider-readiness output/release-drill/provider-readiness.json --approvals output/release-drill/approvals.json --audit output/release-drill/audit.json --memory output/release-drill/memory.json --saved-items output/release-drill/saved-items.json --secret-probe DRILL_REDACTION_PROBE --out output/rehearsal-drill
scripts.engineering:auto-work-smoke: npm run engineering:auto-work -- --mission "Open-source smoke: run one external CLI adapter and import its receipt" --locale zh-Hans --out output/engineering-auto-work --runner-preset fixture --timeout-ms 60000 --generated-at 2026-06-27T00:00:00.000Z
scripts.engineering:guided-smoke: npm run engineering:guided -- --mission "Open-source smoke: run a bounded cabinet loop through a fixed fixture runner" --max-loops 3 --runner-preset fixture --adapter-ready --out output/engineering-guided-smoke --generated-at 2026-06-27T00:00:00.000Z --timeout-ms 60000
scripts.engineering:guided-api-smoke: npm run engineering:guided -- --cabinet-mode api-mock --mission "Open-source smoke: separated API-style cabinet roles supervise a bounded runner loop" --max-loops 2 --runner-preset fixture --adapter-ready --out output/engineering-guided-api-smoke --generated-at 2026-06-27T00:00:00.000Z --timeout-ms 60000
scripts.engineering:guided-openai: npm run engineering:guided -- --cabinet-mode api --cabinet-provider openai --cabinet-api-key-alias NAIKAKU_OPENAI_API_KEY --runner-preset fixture --adapter-ready
scripts.naikaku:task-guided-smoke: npm run naikaku:task -- --guided --cabinet-mode api-mock --max-loops 2 --runner-preset fixture --adapter-ready --out output/naikaku-task-guided-smoke --generated-at 2026-06-27T00:00:00.000Z "Open-source smoke: one short task entry votes, executes, continues, and returns evidence"
scripts.cabinet:api-role-smoke:mock: npm run cabinet:api-role-smoke -- --mock --mission "Open-source smoke: separate provider roles produce proposal, critique, supervision, and a cabinet vote" --out output/cabinet-api-role-smoke --generated-at 2026-06-27T00:00:00.000Z
scripts.provider:aliyun-smoke: npm run cabinet:api-role-smoke -- --provider aliyun --api-key-alias DASHSCOPE_API_KEY --model qwen-turbo --max-tokens 220 --mission "省额度测试：请三个内阁角色只返回最短 JSON 决策，不执行任何外部动作。" --out output/cabinet-api-aliyun-smoke
scripts.release:verify: npm run localization:drill && npm run executor:drill && npm run sandbox:capabilities && npm run security:red-team && npm run runner-auth:drill && npm run coding-agent:dispatch && npm run coding-agent:simulate && npm run coding-agent:runner-manifest && npm run coding-agent:runner-invocation && npm run coding-agent:runner-intake && npm run coding-agent:runner-self-test && npm run coding-agent:runner-lease && npm run coding-agent:sandbox-runner && npm run coding-agent:engineering-sim && npm run coding-agent:drill && npm run rehearsal:drill && tsx scripts/verify-release.ts --report output/rehearsal-drill/release-rehearsal-latest.json --out output/rehearsal-drill/release-verification-latest.json && npm run production:boundary && npm run verification:manifest
scripts.ci:open-source: npm run public-scope:check && npm run deployment:check && npm run strategy:iterate && npm run open-source:mvp-check && npm run test && git diff --check
scripts.preview:self-host: npm run build && npm run runtime-config && npm run preview -- --host 0.0.0.0
